chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2445 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For order on MA No.9034/2017. 3. For hearing of MA No.9035/2017. 4. For hearing of main case. 10.02.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. Sindh. None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. This petition was filed in the year 2017 and it was lastly fixed in Court on 07.11.2017 when Miss. Shazia advocate was holding brief for counsel for the petitioner and sought adjournment. However, thereafter despite such a long period of about eight years no efforts were made by the petitioner to fix this petition in Court, which reflects that the petitioner has no interest to proceed with this petition. Learned A.A.G. Sindh also points out that the petitioner has no Standing of the Bar as required per advertisement, therefore, he was not entitled to be considered for the post claimed. Since none has appeared on behalf of the petitioner nor any intimation is received, as such, this petition is dismissed on account of non-prosecution along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
